tasks.title: Webhook Secrets Hashing
tasks.description: Heširati webhook secrets sa bcrypt/argon2 umjesto plaintext čuvanja u bazi
tasks.detail: WebhookConfig.secret → hash+salt pattern. Migracija postojećih plaintext secrets.
acceptance: Svi webhook secrets su heširani u bazi (bcrypt ili argon2)
Migracija postojećih plaintext secrets bez downtime-a

tasks.title: OAuth Token Encryption
tasks.description: AES-256-GCM enkripcija za GoogleOAuthToken access/refresh tokene
tasks.detail: Encryption at rest za sve OAuth access tokene u Account modelu.
acceptance: OAuth tokeni enkriptovani AES-256-GCM prije čuvanja u DB

risk.impact: Plaintext access tokens za Gmail/Calendar — full account takeover

tasks.title: A2A Circuit Breaker Depth Limit
tasks.description: Implementirati max depth check (5-10) na agent-to-agent pozivima
tasks.detail: Sprječava beskonačnu rekurziju u agent chain-ovima. Visited-agents tracking.
acceptance: Circuit breaker OPEN → HALF_OPEN recovery radi
JSON-RPC 2.0 error codes za circuit breaker stanja
Unit testovi za depth limit i cycle detection

risk.impact: Beskonačni agent-to-agent lanci mogu srušiti server

tasks.title: Redis Rate Limiting
tasks.description: Zamijeniti in-memory Map rate limiter sa Redis-based implementacijom
tasks.detail: Omogućava distribuciju rate limiting-a na multi-replica Railway setup.
acceptance: Fallback na in-memory ako Redis nije dostupan

risk.impact: In-memory rate limiting ne skalira — svaki replica ima svoj counter

tasks.title: MCP Transport Security
tasks.description: Zamijeniti monkey-patch transport validacije sa nginx/caddy TLS proxy konfiguracijom
tasks.detail: Eliminira fragile runtime patching koji puca na svaki MCP SDK update.
acceptance: Monkey-patch uklonjen iz MCP client koda
TLS proxy konfiguran za interne MCP pozive
MCP connection test endpoint radi bez patcha
Upgrade na novi MCP SDK ne zahtijeva code change

risk.impact: Monkey-patch puca na MCP SDK update — svi MCP tools prestaju raditi

tasks.title: NextAuth Stabilizacija
tasks.description: Monitor za stabilnu NextAuth v5 verziju, pinning cookie names
tasks.detail: NextAuth v5 je još u beta — cookie names i session handling mogu se promijeniti.
acceptance: Session validation robusna na cookie name promjene

risk.impact: Session cookie name promjena = svi korisnici izlogovani

tasks.title: ECC Aktivacija u Produkciji
tasks.description: Enableovati ECC_ENABLED=true na Railway + monitoring
tasks.detail: Svi ECC skills, instinct engine i meta-orchestrator postaju aktivni.
acceptance: Rollback plan ako se pojave problemi

tasks.title: Anthropic API Key Konfiguracija
tasks.description: Konfigurirati ANTHROPIC_API_KEY na Railway za Claude modele
tasks.detail: Claude Haiku/Sonnet/Opus modeli postaju dostupni korisnicima.
acceptance: Claude modeli vidljivi u model selector UI
Chat sa Claude modelom radi end-to-end
Rate limiting za Claude pozive aktivan

tasks.title: Schedule Failure Notifikacije
tasks.description: Email/webhook alert kada circuit breaker okinuo ili scheduled task fails
tasks.detail: Sprječava tihe padove scheduled taskova bez obavještenja korisnika.
acceptance: Webhook callback opcija za custom alerting
Circuit breaker state change loguje se sa alertom

tasks.title: OpenTelemetry Aktivacija
tasks.description: Aktivirati OTEL export na Railway → Grafana Cloud
tasks.detail: gen_ai.* semantic conventions za LLM observability. OTLP push exporter.
acceptance: OTLP push exporter šalje trace/metrics na Grafana Cloud
Tool use calls imaju child span-ove

tasks.title: FlowVersion Cleanup Job
tasks.description: Arhivirati/brisati FlowVersion starije od 90 dana
tasks.detail: Sprječava DB bloat od akumuliranih immutable verzija.
acceptance: Cron job briše ARCHIVED verzije starije od 90 dana
PUBLISHED i DRAFT verzije se nikad ne brišu
Dry-run mode za preview šta bi bilo obrisano

tasks.title: CLI Generator Retry Logic
tasks.description: Exponential backoff na LLM API greške u CLI Generator pipeline-u
tasks.detail: Trenutno pipeline fails na prvom API erroru bez retry-a.
acceptance: Retry count loguje se u phase result

tasks.title: KB Search Reranking Poboljšanje
tasks.description: Aktivirati LLM-based reranking za dvosmislene upite
tasks.detail: Reranker postoji ali se rijetko koristi — default ga treba uključiti.
acceptance: Reranking aktivan po defaultu za queries < 5 riječi
A/B test framework za search quality

tasks.title: ECC Batch Config sa Backpressure
tasks.description: Konfigurabilni batch size za skill ingestion sa backpressure mehanizmom
tasks.detail: Trenutno fiksni batch size bez zaštite od overload-a.
acceptance: Backpressure: pauzira ingestion ako embedding queue > 100

tasks.title: E2E Test Expansion
tasks.description: Dodati Playwright spec za A2A, webhooks i ECC skills
tasks.detail: Trenutno 7 E2E spec fajlova — dodati 3 nova za necovered features.
acceptance: A2A spec: card generation, task communication, discovery
Webhooks spec: create, trigger, signature verify, event filter
ECC spec: skill browser, search, skill detail

tasks.title: ECC Instinct Evolucija
tasks.description: AI-powered clustering instinkata u skills sa automatskim promovisanjem
tasks.detail: Confidence > 0.85 → automatska promocija u Skill. Decay mehanizam za neaktivne instinkte. Cron na 3AM daily.
acceptance: Decay: confidence -= 0.05 svaki tjedan bez upotrebe
Cron job na 3AM procesira sve agente sa eccEnabled=true

tasks.title: A2A Protocol Poboljšanje
tasks.description: Implementirati visited-agents tracking, half-open recovery, JSON-RPC 2.0 errors
tasks.detail: Kompletirati A2A circuit breaker sa production-ready error handling.
acceptance: Visited-agents tracking u distributed trace context
Half-open state testira sa jednim probe call-om
Real-time monitoring UI za circuit breaker state
30+ unit testova za sve state transitions

tasks.title: CLI Generator TypeScript Poboljšanje
tasks.description: Poboljšati 6-phase pipeline za TypeScript target output
tasks.detail: McpServer + registerTool pattern, Vitest testovi, ESM imports, package.json generacija.
acceptance: TypeScript target generira 8 fajlova (index.ts, bridge.ts, server.ts, itd.)
Vitest testovi za bridge i server
E2E test za full TypeScript pipeline

tasks.title: Obsidian Vault Integration
tasks.description: Git-synced Obsidian vault kao persistent memory layer za agente
tasks.detail: Agent skills → vault docs. GitMCP bridge za MCP pristup. Adapter stub već postoji.
acceptance: GitHub repo kao Obsidian vault storage
GitMCP bridge ekspozira vault kao MCP server

tasks.title: Redis Cluster Setup
tasks.description: Dodati Redis servis na Railway za rate limiting, MCP pool i session cache
tasks.detail: Railway internal networking za latency < 1ms između servisa.
acceptance: Redis servis na Railway internal network
MCP connection pool sa Redis backend-om
Session cache za JWT token validation
Fallback na in-memory ako Redis je down

tasks.title: Multi-Replica Deployment
tasks.description: Railway multi-replica (2-3 replicas) sa load balancing
tasks.detail: Zahtijeva Redis za shared state. Railway automatski load balance-uje.
acceptance: Health check endpoint radi na svakoj replici
Load test: 100 concurrent users bez degradacije

tasks.title: CDN za Statičke Fajlove
tasks.description: CDN za embed.js, widget assets i Next.js static files
tasks.detail: Smanjuje TTFB za embed widget na globalnom nivou.

tasks.title: Database Read Replicas
tasks.description: PostgreSQL read replicas za analytics i heavy queries
tasks.detail: Razdvajanje read/write workload-a za bolji performance.
acceptance: Analytics queries idu na read replica
Discover/search queries idu na read replica

tasks.title: Kubernetes Migration Plan
tasks.description: Dokumentovati migration plan sa Railway na Kubernetes za dugoročno skaliranje
tasks.detail: Railway je odličan za start ali K8s daje više kontrole za enterprise scale.
acceptance: Helm chart ili Kustomize za env management

risks.description: Plaintext u bazi — breach eksponira sve secrets
Beskonačni agent-to-agent lanci bez depth limita
Monkey-patch transport validacije — puca na SDK update
v5 beta — session cookie names nestabilni
Silent fail scheduled taskova bez notifikacije korisniku
FlowVersion soft archive bez automatskog cleanup-a
